name: @stock-platform/ai-engine
description: AI Engine - LLM-powered insights and explanations

scripts.build: python -c "import ast, pathlib; [ast.parse(pathlib.Path(file).read_text(encoding='utf-8')) for file in ['src/main.py', 'src/prompts.py']]; dist = pathlib.Path('dist'); dist.mkdir(exist_ok=True); (dist / 'build.ok').write_text('ok\n', encoding='utf-8')"
